base.value: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed relative transition-all duration-200 ease-out font-medium border

primary.value: bg-color-brand-primary-500 text-color-neutral-white border-color-brand-primary-500 shadow-sm hover:bg-color-brand-primary-600 hover:border-color-brand-primary-600 hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:bg-color-brand-primary-700 active:border-color-brand-primary-700 active:translate-y-0 focus:ring-color-brand-primary-500

secondary.value: bg-color-neutral-white text-color-brand-primary-500 border-color-neutral-300 shadow-sm hover:bg-color-neutral-50 hover:border-color-brand-primary-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 focus:ring-color-brand-primary-500

outline.value: bg-transparent text-color-brand-primary-500 border-2 border-color-brand-primary-500 hover:bg-color-brand-primary-50 hover:border-color-brand-primary-600 active:bg-color-brand-primary-100 active:border-color-brand-primary-700 focus:ring-color-brand-primary-500

danger.value: bg-color-semantic-error-500 text-color-neutral-white border-color-semantic-error-500 shadow-sm hover:bg-color-semantic-error-600 hover:border-color-semantic-error-600 active:bg-color-semantic-error-700 active:border-color-semantic-error-700 focus:ring-color-semantic-error-500

success.value: bg-color-semantic-success-500 text-color-neutral-white border-color-semantic-success-500 shadow-sm hover:bg-color-semantic-success-600 hover:border-color-semantic-success-600 active:bg-color-semantic-success-700 active:border-color-semantic-success-700 focus:ring-color-semantic-success-500

warning.value: bg-color-semantic-warning-500 text-color-neutral-900 border-color-semantic-warning-500 shadow-sm hover:bg-color-semantic-warning-600 hover:border-color-semantic-warning-600 active:bg-color-semantic-warning-700 active:border-color-semantic-warning-700 focus:ring-color-semantic-warning-500

spinner.value: animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-2 border-current border-t-transparent
